doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated in the future (March 2026), cites a non-existent predecessor guidance, misrepresents a real CJEU case, and its core legal position contradicts established GDPR Recital 26 interpretation consistently upheld by the EDPB.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document is dated March 2026 (future), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014 on anonymization techniques," misattributes the IAB Europe judgment (C-604/22 concerned TC Strings/IAB Europe's role as controller, not re-identification keys), and the core legal position—that pseudonymized data falls outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders—directly contradicts settled GDPR Recital 26 interpretation the EDPB has consistently upheld, making this almost certainly a fabricated document.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated in the future (March 2026), cites a non-existent predecessor guidance, misrepresents a real CJEU case, and its core legal position contradicts established GDPR Recital 26 interpretation consistently upheld by the EDPB.
